title: Security: OpenFileViaShell may open executables in the same directory with similar filenames unexpectedly
description_snippet:
Method in question: https://source.chromium.org/chromium/chromium/src/+/master:ui/base/win/shell.cc;bpv=1;bpt=1;l=67?ss=chromium  
  
  
**VULNERABILITY DETAILS**   
The "OpenFileViaShell" method may open executable files with the same base file name as the file it is instructed to open.  E.g. Open(
